---
title: "Global DGE Summary"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    theme: flatly
params:
  de: NULL
  results_index: NULL
---

---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 13))

de <- params$de
results_index <- params$results_index
```

# Global Differential Expression Report

This report summarizes differential expression results across all cell sets and contrasts.

---

# 1 Pipeline Run Summary

```{r pipeline_summary, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
if (!is.null(results_index) && nrow(results_index) > 0) {
  print(kable(results_index,
        caption = "Pipeline results index"))
        } else {
  cat("No results index available.\n")
}
```

---

# 2 DE Genes per Cell Set and Contrast
```{r DE_genes, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
if (!is.null(de) && nrow(de) > 0) {
  summary_counts <- de %>%
    group_by(cell_set, contrast) %>%
    summarise(
      significant = sum(FDR < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
      min_FDR = formatC(min(FDR, na.rm = TRUE), format="e", digits=2),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  print(kable(summary_counts,
        caption = "Significant DE genes per cell set and contrast"))
        }
```

---

# 3 Significant Genes by Contrast
```{r sig_genes, echo=FALSE}
if (!is.null(de) && nrow(de) > 0) {
  counts <- de %>%
    group_by(cell_set, contrast) %>%
    summarise(significant = sum(FDR < 0.05), .groups="drop")
  p<-ggplot(counts,
         aes(reorder(paste(cell_set, contrast), significant),
             significant)) +
    geom_col(fill="firebrick") +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(
      title = "Significant DE genes per analysis",
      x = "Cell set / contrast",
      y = "Genes (FDR < 0.05)"
    )
  
  print(p)
}
```

---

# 4 Distribution of Effect Sizes
```{r distribution, echo=FALSE}
if (!is.null(de) && nrow(de) > 0) {
  p<-ggplot(de, aes(logFC)) +
    geom_histogram(bins=50, fill="steelblue") +
    facet_wrap(~contrast, scales="free_y") +
    labs(
      title="Distribution of log fold changes",
      x="logFC",
      y="Gene count"
    )
  
  print(p)
}
```

# 5 Overlap of DE Genes Between Contrasts
```{r overlap, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
if (!is.null(de) && nrow(de) > 0) {
  sig <- de %>% filter(FDR < 0.05)
  overlap <- sig %>%
    group_by(gene_id) %>%
    summarise(
      contrasts = paste(unique(contrast), collapse=", "),
      n_contrasts = n_distinct(contrast),
      .groups="drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(n_contrasts))
  top_overlap <- head(overlap, 20)
  print(kable(top_overlap,
        caption="Genes appearing in multiple contrasts"))
  }
```

---

# 6 Most Significant Genes Globally

```{r global_sig, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
if (!is.null(de) && nrow(de) > 0) {
  top <- de %>%
    arrange(FDR) %>%
    head(20) %>%
    mutate(
      logFC = round(logFC, 3),
      FDR = formatC(FDR, format="e", digits=2)
    ) %>%
    select(cell_set, contrast, gene_id, logFC, FDR)
  print(kable(top,
        caption="Top DE genes across all analyses"))
  }
```
